nav.logoffConfirm: Log off everywhere? This signs you out of meet.witysk.org and one.witysk.org.
nav.signInSsoTitle: Sign in with your one.witysk.org account

admin.title: Admin panel
admin.signInTitle: Sign in to access the admin panel
admin.signInBody: The admin panel requires a platform-admin account.

users.notSortable: Not sortable — value comes from one.witysk.org per row
users.suspendReasonPrompt: Reason for suspending this account (optional, shown to admins):
users.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
users.confirmDelete: Delete account {{email}}? This cannot be undone.

ips.addTitle: Block an IP, CIDR, or range

tiCafe.title: Café
tiCafe.subtitle: Members of TI One Voice who are online right now.
tiCafe.empty: No one else is online right now.
tiCafe.signInRequired: Sign in on one.witysk.org first to see who's online.
tiCafe.signInTitle: Sign in to see who's at the Café
tiCafe.signInBody: Café shows who's live in TI One Voice. Sign in with your one.witysk.org account, or with a meet.witysk.org account, then reload this page.
tiCafe.loadFailed: Couldn't reach one.witysk.org. Try again in a moment.
tiCafe.openToTalk: Open to chat — feel free to send a DM
tiCafe.vouches_one: Vouched for {{count}} time by other users
tiCafe.vouches_other: Vouched for {{count}} times by other users
tiCafe.viaOneWitysk: Live data from one.witysk.org. Profile and message links open there in a new tab.

createMeeting.needSignIn: You need to sign in on one.witysk.org before you can create meetings.
createMeeting.haveJoinLink: If you already have a join link, open it directly — no account required to join.
createMeeting.title: Create a meeting
createMeeting.usingDefaults: Using your defaults: up to {{max}} participants, {{recording}}.
createMeeting.fieldBrandingHint: Shown in the lobby and the meeting top bar. JPEG, PNG, WebP or GIF; up to 2 MB.
createMeeting.visibilityHint: By default, only you see this meeting on your Home page.
createMeeting.listForAuth: List on the Home page of other signed-in users
createMeeting.listForAuthDesc: Anyone signed in via one.witysk.org can find and join.
createMeeting.listForAnonDesc: The meeting appears on the public landing page.
createMeeting.unsupportedImageType: Unsupported image type {{type}}; use JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF.
createMeeting.imageTooLarge: Image is {{mb}} MB; max is 2 MB.
createMeeting.uploadFailed: Meeting created but branding upload failed: {{message}}

myMeetings.empty: No meetings yet — create one below.
myMeetings.deleteClosedConfirm: Permanently delete "{{title}}"? This removes the meeting from the list. Recordings are not affected.
myMeetings.endMeetingConfirm: End "{{title}}" for everyone? This kicks all participants.
myMeetings.deleteTitle: Delete this meeting from the list
myMeetings.restartTitle: Reopen this meeting (keeps the same link)

room.endMeetingConfirm: End the meeting for everyone? This will disconnect all participants.

inMeetingSettings.title: Settings
inMeetingSettings.moreSettings: More settings live on the full <1>Settings</1> page.

background.label: Background effect
background.needCamera: Turn on the camera to use backgrounds
background.tooLarge: Image is {{mb}} MB; max is 4 MB.
background.processorFailed: Background effects unsupported on this device.

invite.title: Invite by email
invite.emailsHint: Separate with commas, spaces, or new lines. Max 20.
invite.messageHint: Shown in a quoted box below the invite text.
invite.validNeeded: Enter at least one valid email address.

recordings.title: Recordings
recordings.subtitle: Server-side recordings of your meetings. Local files auto-delete after 30 days (or when you publish to YouTube). Uploads are owner-initiated only.
recordings.empty: No recordings yet. Start a meeting and click <1>Record</1> to capture one.
recordings.signInTitle: Sign in to see your recordings
recordings.signInBody: Recordings are owner-only. Sign in with your one.witysk.org account, or with a meet.witysk.org account, then reload this page.
recordings.publishTitle: Upload to YouTube and delete the local file on success
recordings.publishConfirm:
Upload this recording to YouTube as {{privacy}}?
On success the local file will be deleted; only the YouTube link will remain.
recordings.deleteConfirm: Delete this recording? The local file (if any) is removed but the YouTube link is kept.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Preferences are stored in this browser only. They apply when you join or create meetings.

av.subtitle: How your mic and camera behave when you join a meeting.
av.defaultVolumeHint: Applied to the meeting audio renderer when you join.
av.pttHint: When enabled, your mic stays muted unless you hold the key below.

display.layoutAuto: Auto — presenter when set, grid otherwise
display.hideEmpty: Hide tiles with no camera or audio

meeting.subtitle: Applied when you create a new meeting — you can override per-meeting.
meeting.recordingAuto: Auto — record as soon as I join
meeting.greetingHint: Shown to guests on the join page.
meeting.welcomeHint: Posted to the chat when someone joins.

moderation.subtitle: Owner-only defaults applied to new meetings.
moderation.requireName: Require a display name on join
moderation.lockOnStart: Lock the room after the meeting starts

recording.subtitle: Owner-only settings for server-side recordings.
recording.includeChat: Include chat transcript with the recording
recording.ssSeparate: Record screenshare as a separate file
recording.captions: Embed live captions in the recording
recording.noticeOnStart: Show a notice to participants when recording starts

notifications.soundOnJoin: Play a sound when someone joins
notifications.browserNotif: Show a browser notification when someone joins
notifications.ignoreOwnJoins: Don't play sounds for my own joins
notifications.highlightModActions: Highlight moderator actions in the activity log

privacy.secureMode: Start new meetings in secure mode (E2EE — disables recording)
privacy.retention: Delete my recordings after (days, 0 = server default of 30)
privacy.anonymise: Anonymise participant emails in my server-side join log
privacy.noLogIp: Don't log my IP address with join events
privacy.blurEmail: Blur participant emails in my screenshots

accessibility.announceEvents: Announce participant events via screen reader

chat.saveHistory: Save chat history on this device
chat.sendOnEnter: Enter sends (disable for Ctrl/Cmd+Enter to send)

appearance.bgOpacityHint: Applies to the meeting background and lobby overlays.

developer.experimentalHint: Opts this browser into features that may be incomplete or change without notice.

reset.hint: Restores every setting on this page to the factory default.

home.description: Free, browser-based video meetings for the witysk.org community. Audio Café, screen-share, persistent chat with images, and 30-day recordings — up to 50 participants per room, no install. Sign in with one.witysk.org or create a meet account for a 10-day free trial.
home.upsellBody: Your free trial has ended. Redeem a voucher or subscribe to keep creating meetings. Joining meetings, audio Café, and chat stay free.

auth.signupTrialNote: You'll get a 10-day free trial — meeting creation works immediately. After the trial, redeem a voucher or subscribe to keep creating meetings.
auth.haveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.loginNote: If you have a one.witysk.org account, that's used automatically — no login form needed there.
auth.twoFactorPrompt: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app — or one of your recovery codes.
auth.twoFactorPromptBoth: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app, an emailed code, or a recovery code.
auth.twoFactorPromptEmail: Enter the 6-digit code we just emailed you.

account.title: Your account
account.signInTitle: Sign in to manage your account
account.signInBody: Sign in on one.witysk.org or create a meet account first.
account.cannotCreate: Meeting creation: locked — needs voucher or subscription
account.facepicSsoNote: Your picture comes from one.witysk.org and can only be changed there.
account.profileSsoNote: Your profile is managed on one.witysk.org. Changes there will appear here automatically.
account.deleteWarning: Permanently delete your account, profile picture and password-reset tokens. Meetings you've created remain accessible to participants who already had the link, but you'll no longer be associated with them. This cannot be undone.
account.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete your account? This cannot be undone.

vouchers.title: Vouchers
vouchers.signInBody: Voucher administration requires an authorised one.witysk.org account.
vouchers.forbidden: You don't have permission to issue vouchers.
vouchers.justIssued: New voucher — copy and share it now:

upgrade.title: Upgrade
upgrade.signInBody: Sign in (or create an account) to redeem a voucher or subscribe.
upgrade.intro: Get unlimited meeting creation. Pick monthly or yearly billing, or redeem a voucher.
upgrade.paypalConfigNote: PayPal billing wires up once PAYPAL_CLIENT_ID / SECRET are configured server-side.
upgrade.ssoNoVoucher: SSO accounts already have admin rights — no voucher needed.
upgrade.redeemOk: Voucher accepted — admin rights granted for {{days}} days, valid until {{date}}.
upgrade.ssoNoPaypal: SSO accounts already have admin rights — no subscription needed.
upgrade.subscribedOkYearly: Yearly subscription active — meeting creation unlocked.
upgrade.monthlyOnceOk: 30 days of access unlocked. Thank you!
upgrade.paypalNoPlan: Create a monthly subscription plan in the PayPal dashboard and set PAYPAL_PLAN_ID_MONTHLY.
upgrade.paypalNoPlanMonthly: PAYPAL_PLAN_ID_MONTHLY not set on the server.
upgrade.paypalNoPlanAnnual: PAYPAL_PLAN_ID_ANNUAL not set on the server.
upgrade.trialOffer: Try meet with full meeting-creation rights for 10 days. One-time per account — no card required.
upgrade.trialExpired: Your trial has been used. Subscribe or redeem a voucher to keep creating meetings.
upgrade.cancelConfirm: Cancel auto-renewal? You keep access until the period you've already paid for ends.
upgrade.cancelOk: Auto-renewal cancelled. Access continues until your paid period ends.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.intro: Enter the email address you used to sign up. If we find a matching account we'll send you a password-reset link valid for 30 minutes.
forgot.done: If that email is registered, a reset link is on its way. Check your inbox (and spam folder).

reset.title: Choose a new password
reset.missingToken: This page must be opened from the link in the password-reset email.

twofa.title: Two-factor authentication
twofa.intro: Add a second step at sign-in. Use an authenticator app, an emailed code, or both.
twofa.scanQr: Scan with Google Authenticator, 1Password, Authy, or any TOTP app:
twofa.recoveryWarning: Each code works once if you lose access to your authenticator. They will not be shown again.
twofa.regenerateConfirm: Enter a current 6-digit code from your app to issue new recovery codes:
twofa.emailIntro: We email a 6-digit code to your account address each time you sign in.
twofa.emailSentTo: Code sent to {{to}}. Enter it below to enable email codes.
